subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Though thou art weary of heart and fettered by ties of kindred, yet art thou a cherished servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند از خویش و پیوند آزرده دل و در بندی ولی بنده عزیز
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @stories; anecdotes, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @predictions and prophecies, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
